title: Delicate Mediterranean Lamb Skewers
description: A light and citrusy Mediterranean dish featuring lamb, perfect for spring, and lacto-vegetarian friendly when served without the lamb or substituted with portobello mushrooms, cooked to perfection in a bamboo steamer.
instructions: Preheat the bamboo steamer by filling the bottom with 2 inches of water and bringing to a boil.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, oregano, thyme, salt, and pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the lamb cubes, zucchini slices, and bell pepper slices onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers in the bamboo steamer, cover with a lid, and steam for 12 minutes or until the lamb is cooked to 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional thyme and lemon wedges if desired.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
Serve with a side of quinoa or roasted vegetables for a complete meal.
